name: Edward.Newgate (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the start of your next turn. Then, you cannot add Life cards to your hand using your own effects during this turn.[DON!! x2] [When Attacking] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the artist credit (note the lack of pen symbol next to the artist name).
